2605.00628.title: EGREFINE: An Execution-Grounded Optimization Framework for Text-to-SQL Schema Refinement
2605.00628.paper_summary: Text-to-SQL enables non-expert users to query databases in natural language, yet real-world schemas often suffer from ambiguous, abbreviated, or inconsistent naming conventions that degrade model accuracy. Existing approaches treat schemas as fixed and address errors downstream. In this paper, we frame schema refinement as a constrained optimization problem: find a renaming function that maximizes downstream Text-to-SQL execution accuracy while preserving query equivalence through database views. We analyze the computational hardness of this problem, which motivates a column-wise greedy decomposition, and instantiate it as EGRefine: a four-phase pipeline that screens ambiguous columns, generates context-aware candidate names, verifies them through execution-grounded feedback, and materializes the result as non-destructive SQL views. The pipeline carries two structural properties: column-local non-degradation, ensured by the conservative selection rule in the verification phase, and database-level query equivalence, ensured by the view-based materialization phase. Together they make the resulting refinement safe by construction at the column level, with cross-column and prompt-level interactions handled empirically rather than analytically. Across controlled schema-degradation, real-world, and enterprise benchmarks, EGRefine recovers accuracy lost to schema naming noise where applicable and correctly abstains where the underlying task exceeds current Text-to-SQL capabilities, with refined schemas transferring across model families to enable refine-once, serve-many-models deployment. Code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/ai-jiaqian/EGRefine.
2605.00628.paper_summary_zh: Text-to-SQL 使非專業用戶能夠以自然語言查詢數據庫，但現實世界的模式往往受到模糊、縮寫或不一致的命名慣例的影響，從而降低模型的準確性。現有的方法將模式視為固定的，並在下游處理錯誤。在本文中，我們將模式精煉框架設置為一個約束優化問題：尋找一個重命名函數，以最大化下游 Text-to-SQL 執行準確性，同時通過數據庫視圖保持查詢等價性。我們分析了這個問題的計算困難性，這促使我們採用列式貪婪分解，並將其具體化為 EGRefine：一個四階段的流程，篩選模糊列，生成上下文感知的候選名稱，通過執行基礎的反饋進行驗證，並將結果具現化為非破壞性的 SQL 視圖。該流程具有兩個結構性質：列本地的非降級性，通過驗證階段的保守選擇規則來確保，以及數據庫級的查詢等價性，通過基於視圖的具現化階段來確保。它們共同使得結果的精煉在列級別上構造安全，並且跨列和提示級別的交互是經驗性處理而非分析性處理。在受控的模式降級、現實世界和企業基準測試中，EGRefine 恢復了因模式命名噪聲而損失的準確性，並在基礎任務超出當前 Text-to-SQL 能力的情況下正確地避免使用，經過精煉的模式在模型家族之間轉移，以實現一次精煉、多模型服務的部署。代碼和數據可在 https://github.com/ai-jiaqian/EGRefine 獲得。
2605.00628.author: Jiaqian Wang et.al.
2605.00628.authors: Jiaqian Wang, Yutao Qi, Wenjin Hou, Yu Pang, Rui Yang
